speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: Fear not, Abram, I am your shield; your reward shall be very great.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: This man shall not be your heir; your very own son shall be your heir.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: Look toward heaven and number the stars, if you are able to number them.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: I am YHWH who brought you out from Ur of the Chaldeans to give you this land to possess.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: Bring me a heifer three years old, a female goat three years old, a ram three years old, a turtledove, and a young pigeon.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: Know for certain that your offspring will be sojourners in a land that is not theirs and will be servants there, and they will be afflicted for four hundred years.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: But I will bring judgment on the nation that they serve, and afterward they shall come out with great possessions.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: As for you, you shall go to your fathers in peace; you shall be buried in a good old age.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: And they shall come back here in the fourth generation, for the iniquity of the Amorites is not yet complete.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: To your offspring I give this land, from the river of Egypt to the great river, the river Euphrates.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: The land of the Kenites, the Kenizzites, and the Kadmonites.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: The Hittites, the Perizzites, the Rephaim.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: The Amorites, the Canaanites, the Girgashites, and the Jebusites.
